highlights.text: Private yacht Phi Phi & James Bond Island speed-craft
150-min spa, Michelin dining & beach candlelight finale

itinerary.title: Luxury Phuket Retreat
itinerary.tagline: Phuket Island • Phi Phi Islands • Phang Nga Bay
itinerary.overview: Luxury Phuket Retreat — VIP fast-track arrival, private yacht Phi Phi charter, James Bond Island, 150-min spa, Michelin dining, and private beach candlelight finale.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 06N/07D Phuket retreat (TH-012): private yacht, James Bond Island, Michelin dining, and beach candlelight dinner.

highlights.text: James Bond Island & Sea Cave Canoeing

days.title: Phuket Arrival & Private Villa Indulgence
days.description: VIP fast-track at Phuket Airport. Transfer to ultra-luxury pool villa with champagne welcome. Private chef poolside dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP fast-track arrival, private resort transfer
Evening Experience: Bespoke 4-course private villa welcome dinner
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Bespoke Private Villa Welcome Dinner

days.title: Private Luxury Yacht to Phi Phi Islands
days.description: Full-day private yacht charter to Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Bamboo Island, and Viking Cave with onboard gourmet lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private yacht Phi Phi charter
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Onboard Yacht Gourmet Lunch

days.title: Heritage & Ultra-Wellness Immersion
days.description: Floating breakfast. Old Phuket Town heritage walk. 150-minute rejuvenation spa package. Cliffside sunset cocktails.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Old Phuket Town, Wat Chalong, Karon Viewpoint
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: Premium Floating Breakfast & Contemporary Thai Dinner

days.title: Phang Nga Bay Sea Cave Canoeing
days.description: Private speed-craft to James Bond Island. Koh Hong sea cave canoeing and Koh Panyee floating village.
activities: Sightseeing Included: James Bond Island, Koh Hong canoeing, Koh Panyee
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Koh Panyee Seafood Lunch

days.title: Leisure & Michelin Dining Experience
days.description: Resort leisure day. Evening Michelin-starred or top-rated contemporary tasting menu dinner.
activities: Evening Experience: Bespoke Michelin tasting menu dining
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Michelin Star Gastronomy Dinner

days.title: Boutique Shopping & Candlelight Finale
days.description: Central Phuket Floresta luxury shopping. Signature private beachfront candlelight grand finale dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Central Phuket Floresta
Evening Experience: Grand finale private beachfront candlelight dinner
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Ultra-Luxury Ocean-View Pool Villa)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & 5-Course Beachside Dinner

days.title: Phuket Departure
days.description: Final breakfast at villa veranda. Private transfer to Phuket International Airport with premium lounge assistance.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer, premium lounge entry
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

hotels.name: Pullman Phuket Arcadia Naithon Beach / similar
The Westin Siray Bay Resort & Spa

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in ultra-luxury ocean pool villas in Phuket
VIP fast-track airport reception and customs clearance
Private luxury yacht charter to Phi Phi Islands with gourmet lunch
Private speed-craft James Bond Island tour with sea canoeing
150-minute premium rejuvenating massage and Michelin dining experience
Private beachfront candlelight grand finale dinner
International airfare and Thailand visa fees
National park fees and personal expenses
